name: Memory
description: Save, read, or delete persistent memories across sessions. Use action='save' to store, action='read' to query, action='delete' to remove by id.

args.name: scope
args.description: 'agent' (default), 'project', or 'thread' — where to store/query the memory. 'thread' is shared across all agents in this conversation.

args.name: key
args.description: [thread] Short label to namespace the entry, e.g. 'stack', 'auth_flow', 'todos'

args.name: data
args.description: [thread] Optional structured JSON payload alongside content

args.name: content
args.description: [save] The fact, decision, or context to remember

args.name: tags
args.description: [save/read] Tag strings for categorisation or filtering

args.name: search
args.description: [read] Substring to search for in memory content

args.name: memory_id
args.description: [delete] The id of the memory to remove
